svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="整体调用链路" id="bridge-overview"> <mxGraphModel dx="-579" dy="-157" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1100" pageHeight="620" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="GRP_MAIN" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8fafc;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;fontColor=#1e293b;spacingTop=6;" value="主调用链路（模型调度 + 框架自动执行 + 结果回喂续生成）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="180" width="1040" x="30" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="U" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="运营前端
ChatService 入口" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="140" x="50" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="C" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="ChatService
组装 toolCallbacks + toolContext" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="160" x="220" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="M" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="LLM
决定调哪个工具" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="140" x="410" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="BR" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="AiToolBridgeConfig
桥接层（收集/适配/透传）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="170" x="580" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="FTC" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="FunctionToolCallback
Spring AI" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="160" x="780" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="H" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="ToolHandler 实现
业务工具" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="100" x="970" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eUC" edge="1" parent="1" source="U" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="C"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eCM" edge="1" parent="1" source="C" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;fontSize=10;fontColor=#475569;" target="M" value="prompt + toolCallbacks + toolContext"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eMBR" edge="1" parent="1" source="M" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;fontSize=10;fontColor=#475569;" target="BR" value="决定调谁"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eBRFTC" edge="1" parent="1" source="BR" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;fontSize=10;fontColor=#475569;" target="FTC" value="适配"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eFTCH" edge="1" parent="1" source="FTC" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="H"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eBack" edge="1" parent="1" source="H" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;dashed=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;fontSize=10;fontColor=#475569;" target="M" value="ToolResult 回喂续生成"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="1020" y="90" /> <mxPoint x="480" y="90" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eOut" edge="1" parent="1" source="M" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;dashed=1;exitX=0;exitY=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;fontSize=10;fontColor=#475569;" target="U" value="Flux 文本 / SSE 打字机"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="120" y="95" /> <mxPoint x="120" y="95" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="GRP_BIZ" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8fafc;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;fontColor=#1e293b;spacingTop=6;" value="业务侧" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="140" x="940" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="S" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="业务 Service
订单 / 商品 / 店铺" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="120" x="950" y="338" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eHS" edge="1" parent="1" source="H" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;exitX=1;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="S"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="GRP_SUP" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f0fdfa;strokeColor=#5eead4;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;fontColor=#134e4a;spacingTop=6;" value="旁路支撑（审计 + 写操作门禁）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="880" x="30" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="LG" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ccfbf1;strokeColor=#14b8a6;fontColor=#134e4a;fontSize=11;" value="ai_assistant_tool_log
全量工具调用审计表" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="180" x="60" y="338" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="CG" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ccfbf1;strokeColor=#14b8a6;fontColor=#134e4a;fontSize=11;" value="ConfirmationGate
Redis token + 参数哈希 + 5min TTL + 消费即删" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="320" x="280" y="338" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eHLG" edge="1" parent="1" source="H" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#14b8a6;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;dashed=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;fontSize=10;fontColor=#134e4a;" target="LG" value="每次调用落审计"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="1020" y="280" /> <mxPoint x="150" y="280" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eHCG" edge="1" parent="1" source="H" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#14b8a6;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;dashed=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;fontSize=10;fontColor=#134e4a;" target="CG" value="requiresConfirmation 时拦截"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="1020" y="290" /> <mxPoint x="440" y="290" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
